'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 13 and 14 and 15 and 16 and 17 and 18 and 20 and 24 and 37.

[[Category:Generated Gaiad character entries for the 1st 62 chapters]]
[[Category:Shrank pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
